regeneration_note: 2026-05-15 entries were authored against state captured at conversation start. By report time, add-coordinator-task-status-renderer had been archived AND add-coordinator-kanban-viz had been planned. The 2026-05-16 entries below reflect that corrected reality; the 2026-05-15 entries are retained for audit but their statuses are updated.

recommendations.reason: TOP PICK. Proposal planned within ~7h of this regeneration (0/71 tasks, Gate 1 approved). Vite+React+TS SPA + SSE + new coordinator endpoints + Tauri scaffold. Composes with the just-shipped renderer (data contract) and the codeviz roadmap (toolchain + conventions). Addresses the chronic multi-cycle 'no global view' pain AND the fresh-today 'specced but unimplemented' pain.

Complementary to kanban-viz, not competing. Board answers 'what is the state across all agents?'; skill answers 'why is THIS one change stuck?' Scores 3.10 vs kanban-viz's 3.025 on the formula due to S-vs-M effort discount. Best as parallel /plan-feature track while kanban-viz implementation runs.
Orthogonal to viz work. Worth doing but lower urgency than the two top picks.
Orthogonal to viz work. Promote only if compact-quality pain re-emerges after kanban-viz and /why-am-i-blocked ship.

Archived as 2026-05-16-add-coordinator-task-status-renderer earlier today. Renderer skill 'coordinator-task-status-renderer' now in catalog. This was the prior cycle's top recommendation and shipped end-to-end (plan → reviews → implement → cleanup → archive) in one day. Now serves as kanban-viz's data-contract dependency.

Yesterday's hand-waved 'minimal HTML page' candidate is fully subsumed by the actually-specced kanban-viz (~1500 LOC SPA covering the same surface plus vendor swimlanes, sync-point banner, and saved views). Replanning to a smaller scope would re-litigate decisions already through Gate 1.
kanban-viz includes a new /events/work SSE endpoint that satisfies the original April goal at greater specificity (per-change-id scoping, snapshot-on-reconnect, NOTIFY-wired transitions).
Per-repo worktree registries aggregated to coordinator. Needed for cross-repo global view in the user's multi-window ghostty workflow.
Textual TUI subscribing to the SSE stream. Fits ghostty workflow natively (runs in a tab/window). Python-native, no new stack. Validates data model before any desktop/web investment.
Deferred until TUI validates which views matter. Zero-new-runtime implementation once stream lands.
Complements real-time UIs with historical analytics over existing OTEL metrics. Can ship independently as a parallel package.
Introduces Rust/JS toolchain with no reuse elsewhere. Revisit only if web dashboard proves insufficient. Thin wrapper once web app exists.
Platform-locked Swift stack with zero repo reuse. A Tauri tray icon covers most of the value cross-platform.
Previous top pick; carried forward. Still relevant (the web dashboard benefits from tunnel access) but orthogonal to the current visualization focus.
Carried forward; complementary to tunnel. Not on the critical path for visualization.
Carried forward (4th cycle). Big bet; orthogonal to visualization focus.
Carried forward. Blocked on tunnel setup.
Carried forward. CORS work will matter once the web dashboard lands.
